# Reference Synthesis

## Overview

A fixture synthesis note that draws a single theme across the concept and entity
pages in this vault. It exists to exercise the synthesis-shape checks while staying
grounded in [[Provenance Primer]].

## Analysis

The concept [[Provenance]] and the entity [[Sample Tool]] are two views of the same
idea: information is only trustworthy when its origin is traceable. The concept states
the principle; the entity applies it by citing its source.

## Key Insights

- A provenance chain is only as strong as its weakest link — every page in the chain
  must cite its source.
- A small vault can still demonstrate the full claim-to-raw traceability loop.

## Gaps

The fixture covers a single source and a single chain; it does not exercise competing
or contradictory sources.

## Sources Consulted

- [[Provenance Primer]] — the one source underpinning both pages in scope.
